titleStmt.title: SII 10.63: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 63. (A.R. No. 277 of 1905.) ON A SLAB SET UP CLOSE TO THE PRńÄKńÄRA ON THE RIGHT SIDE OF THE BLOCKED UP WESTERN ENTRANCE TO THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURńÄNTAKńíŇöVARA AT THE SAME VILLAGE. Ňö. 1028.

summary.p: Records the gift of the village BńďŠĻ≠alapńĀŠłću in KammanńĀŠĻáŠłću by VelanńĀŠĻ≠i GŇćŠĻÖkarńĀju to the temple of TripurńĀntakadńďva.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
